videos.description: ...snow conditions are all time, with fresh snow, HUGE wind drifts and 100% of lifts in operation!

videos.title: Pub to Pub Classic at Perisher Resort. Thursday 3rd September 2009
videos.description:
In it's 27th year, Perisher's iconic Pub-to-Pub Cross-Country Classic, now in its 27th consecutive year, sees a mix of serious racers and dressed up cruisers having fun traversing the resort on skinny skis. 
The Classic takes in five watering holes in Smiggin Holes and Perisher Valley and is open to anyone with a pair of cross-country skis and a 'thirst' for adventure. Starting in 1983 with just five competitors, it has now evolved into an annual event attracting up to 500 entrants.

videos.title: Trevor (Hastings High School) ski race 1/ 7/16 @ St  Thomas Academy
videos.description: Hastings 7th, 8th, and 9th grade nordic skiers competed against conference schools at St. Thomas Academy on 1.7.16. Trevor finished first in the 8th and 7th grade 2.5 KM race. His finish time was 7:57.

videos.title: Kosciuszko Cross Country Ski School Movie AUGUST 2012-Large.m4v
videos.description: Fun on the Perisher Nordic Trails - Cross country skiing is a recreational winter pursuit as well as serious race and Olympic discpline! K7 Adventures Ski School enjoys all aspects of nordic skiing from ski touring, skiing the nordic trails, racing and of course, instructing! Nordic skiing suitable for all ages and all skills level.

videos.title: Overnight Cross-Country Ski Adventures In Three Sisters Wilderness
videos.description:
A series of huts offer overnight lodging in the Three Sisters mountains of Central Oregon. Backcountry experience isn’t necessary to enjoy a multi-day, cross-country adventure.

Full story here:
https://www.opb.org/news/article/three-sisters-backcountry-ski-huts/

videos.title: The American Birkebeiner cross-country ski race
videos.description:
Since it was first held 50 years ago, the American Birkebeiner, a trek of more than 30 miles through the Northwoods of Wisconsin, modeled after a fabled bit of Norwegian history, has become the largest cross-country ski race in the U.S. Correspondent Conor Knighton reports on how enthusiasm for the festival of events surrounding the race (dubbed "Birke fever") has snowballed.
#Birkebeiner #crosscountryski 

"CBS Sunday Morning" features stories on the arts, music, nature, entertainment, sports, history, science and Americana, and highlights unique human accomplishments and achievements. Check local listings for CBS Sunday Morning broadcast times.

Tony wise was born in Hayward and was a
born marketer after serving in World War

to Wisconsin a place where a
Scandinavian ancestry is common as a way
to encourage tourism his first Berkey

participants most of whom had never

and down after that first I would never

today at age 75
Ernie St Germain is the only competitor

the race itself has faced challenges
